candidates.why: Generic operating depreciation line appears later in the operating expense section and is not clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of goods sold' / 'Cost of revenues/COGS'). Adding it to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting.
Generic operating amortization line is not labelled as COGS-related and appears outside the selected COGS rows.
This looks like a broader operating D&A/write-down summary, not a COGS-specific D&A row alongside the selected COGS lines.
Generic amortization row is not identified as belonging to COGS and should not be added to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is shown for cost of goods sold / cost of revenues. The visible D&A rows are SG&A-, R&D-, or generic operating-expense-related, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly labelled as D&A within SG&A, but it appears directly under Selling expenses and Administrative Expenses with balancing rows, indicating it is a sub-component of those selected parent rows rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

Explicit SGA depreciation component, but the row placement with selling/admin sections and balancing values suggests it is embedded within the selected SG&A component rows, so adding separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in SGA
candidates.why: Explicit SGA amortization component nested under selected SG&A parent rows; should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D D&A component under the selected 'Research and development costs' row. Because R&D is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, the special R&D rule says not to add this separately.
Explicit R&D depreciation component nested under the selected R&D row; with R&D already mapped in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding it separately would distort the intended construction.
Generic depreciation line later in the operating expense section is not clearly bucketed to the selected SG&A components and may overlap with broader operating expenses; too broad to add safely.
Generic amortization line is not clearly separate SG&A D&A relative to the selected SG&A component rows.
Broad operating D&A/write-down summary likely spans more than SG&A and is not a clean separate add-back for the selected SG&A bucket.
Generic amortization row is not clearly tied only to the selected SG&A bucket and may overlap with broader operating lines.

variables.notes: The explicit SG&A and R&D D&A rows appear as sub-components beneath selected parent rows ('Selling expenses', 'Administrative Expenses', 'Research and development costs') with balancing rows, so they are treated as already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket. The generic depreciation/amortization rows later in the operating section are broader operating lines and should not be added to XSGA separately. Also, 'Research and development costs' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so R&D D&A should not be added separately.
